name: pipeline-prop-kit
description: Batch-produce a consistent themed prop kit and validate it in Unity.

stages.instructions: Define theme, exact prop list, shared dimensions, budgets, and acceptance criteria.
Verify references, dependencies, and licenses before creation.
Create reusable blockouts and procedural variants with stable ids.
Finish each prop to the shared naming, scale, and budget contract.
Apply a shared PBR material strategy and consistent texel density.
Validate each prop support anchor, hierarchy transform, local support-plane contact, and export origin from evaluated geometry.
Validate poly budgets, origins, LOD readiness, and exports.
Import and create one prefab per manifest asset.
Add proportionate colliders and validate static or dynamic body settings.
Test every prefab in a deterministic validation scene.
Check LFS, metadata, manifest checksums, and prepare the unit of work.
